## New Starter Kit Submission

**Package:** `vendor/package-name`

### Checklist

- [ ] My repository is public on GitHub (Packagist is optional)
- [ ] My repository contains a valid `shopper-kit.yaml` at the root
- [ ] My repository has a README with installation instructions
- [ ] Description is under 200 characters
- [ ] `official` is set to `false`
- [ ] `slug` is unique and uses lowercase kebab-case
- [ ] I have read the [contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
